about.label: // About
about.title:
The tsundere token
that actually delivers
about.subtitle: $TSUN lives on TON Blockchain and fuses anime culture with real GameFi mechanics. She acts tough  -  the fundamentals are bulletproof. Not that she cares what you think.
about.card1Text: Open card packs, collect Tsundere Waifu cards, fuse duplicates into rarer editions, and trade with other players. All inside Telegram. Top collectors qualify for the $TSUN airdrop.
about.card2Text: Contract renounced. Liquidity locked via TonRaffles. Zero percent tax on all buys and sells. No hidden wallets. No funny business.
about.card3Text: Lightning-fast transactions and native Telegram integration via TON Blockchain. Reach millions of users without leaving the app they already use daily.
about.card4Text: "It's not like I want you to hold my token... b-baka! I just think TON needs more anime culture, that's all. Don't read too much into it."
about.card5Text: Indie project, anonymous team, renounced contract. The roadmap is public, the LP is locked, and the code is verifiable on-chain. No VC. No presale. No BS.
about.card6Text: Top leaderboard collectors qualify for the Phase 3 $TSUN airdrop. Play free, build your collection, earn real tokens. The earlier you start - the better your position.

game.label: // Game
game.title: Card Collection & Trading
game.subtitle: Collect rare Tsundere Waifu cards, craft Legendary editions, trade on the marketplace, win auctions, and compete on the leaderboard. The rarer your collection - the higher your airdrop rank.
game.card1Text: Collect daily resources and open Card Scrolls to discover Tsundere Waifu cards. Each scroll reveals a random card - from Common to Legendary - with provably fair randomness.
game.card2Text: Two crafting paths: the safe route (collect 10 identical cards for a guaranteed upgrade) or the risky route (combine five cards of the same rarity for a chance at the tier above). The ultimate Legend requires both strategy and patience.
game.card3Text: Buy and sell cards on the in-game marketplace, bid on rare cards at real-time auctions, or gift duplicates to friends. A live player-driven economy where your collection has real value - and the rarest cards can be minted as NFTs on TON.
game.disclaimer: In-game resources and cards have no monetary value. NFT minting is optional and at the player's own cost. Airdrop eligibility is based on collection score and leaderboard rank at Phase 2 close.

community.label: // Community
community.title: Join the tsundere side
community.subtitle: It's not like she wants you here... but the Telegram is open. B-baka.
community.card1Text: The main hub. Announcements, memes, alpha, and Tsun-chan losing her temper. Join before she notices you're late.
community.card2Text: Your personal gateway. Get notified when the card game launches, track your collection, and receive airdrop updates directly in Telegram.
community.card3Text: Early adopters building the base. Every new holder makes Tsun-chan slightly less annoyed. Slightly.

howToBuy.label: // How to Buy
howToBuy.title: 3 steps to hold $TSUN
howToBuy.step1Text: Download Tonkeeper or use @wallet inside Telegram. Create a new wallet and save your seed phrase.
howToBuy.step2Text: Buy TON via P2P, an exchange, or directly inside your wallet. You'll need a small amount for gas fees and the swap.
howToBuy.step3Text: Go to STON.fi, paste the contract address, and swap TON for $TSUN. Welcome to the tsundere side.

notify.liveSubtitle: Join collectors from across the TON ecosystem. Build your card collection, craft Legendary editions, trade on the marketplace. Top players qualify for the Phase 3 airdrop.
notify.liveCardText: Open the Tsunonton Card Collection Game in Telegram, start opening Card Scrolls, craft rare editions, and trade on the marketplace. Airdrop eligibility is based on your collection score and leaderboard position at Phase 2 close.
notify.liveCardNote: Free to play. No purchase required.

faq.label: // FAQ
faq.title:
Questions she'd never
answer directly
faq.a1: Tsun On TON ($TSUN) is an anime-themed GameFi project on the TON blockchain built around a Card Collection Game. Open Card Scrolls to collect Tsundere Waifu cards, craft Legendary editions, trade on the marketplace, bid at auctions, and compete for leaderboard rewards. Top collectors qualify for the Phase 3 $TSUN airdrop. In-game resources and cards have no monetary value.
faq.a2: The contract is renounced - meaning no one can change the code. Liquidity is locked via TonRaffles. There's 0% tax. These are standard safety measures. That said, $TSUN is a meme token and all cryptocurrency carries risk. Always do your own research.
faq.a3: Community reports indicate the contract is renounced. You can verify current status on Tonviewer. Renounced contracts reduce admin control but do not eliminate risks like bugs, exploits, or market volatility.
faq.a4: Initial liquidity is reported locked using third-party lockers on the TON network (TonRaffles). Please verify lock status on-chain. Liquidity locks reduce some risks but are not a guarantee against loss.
faq.q5: When does the card game launch and how do I qualify for the airdrop?
faq.a5: The Card Collection Game Mini-App is in active development (Phase 2). Launch will be announced via @tsunonton_bot - subscribe to get notified first and unlock early access bonuses. Airdrop eligibility in Phase 3 is based on your collection score and leaderboard position at Phase 2 close. The earlier you start, the better your rank.
faq.q6: Do I need to hold $TSUN to play the card game?
faq.a6: No  -  the Card Collection Game is free to play for everyone in Telegram. You earn resources daily (Affection, Energy, Shards) through time-based progression and spend them on Card Scrolls. However, $TSUN holders receive improved drop rates for rare cards, early access to new card series, and exclusive seasonal bonuses  -  a meaningful edge for serious collectors.
faq.q7: Can I earn real money from the game?
faq.a7: No. The game is designed for entertainment and collection. In-game resources (Affection, Energy, Shards) cannot be exchanged for $TSUN or any real-world asset. Phase 3 airdrops are at the team's discretion and based on leaderboard position  -  not a guaranteed financial return. Always DYOR.
faq.a8: The crypto market can act like a classic tsundere: harsh one minute, affectionate the next. We embrace that culture with Web3 meme energy plus anime-inspired GameFi aesthetics.
faq.q9: What happens if I connect my wallet?
faq.a9: Connecting a wallet via official TON Connect protocols is standard practice. It can verify on-chain ownership for optional features (like syncing scores or potential rewards). The app cannot execute transactions without your explicit wallet approval.
